Appendix

Juan C. Correa

2026-07-13

Pre-processing data

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
## 
## Attaching package: 'dplyr'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter, lag
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
library(igraph)
## 
## Attaching package: 'igraph'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:dplyr':
## 
##     as_data_frame, groups, union
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     decompose, spectrum
## The following object is masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     union
Secuencia <- read_delim(
  "Secuencia.csv",
  delim = ";",
  escape_double = FALSE,
  trim_ws = TRUE
)
## New names:
## • `` -> `...1`
## Rows: 7542 Columns: 12
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ";"
## chr (4): Condicion, ChosenCondition, NombreEstimulo, NombreSeleccionado
## dbl (8): ...1, Sujeto, Posicion, Ensayo, Area, Dwell, Secuencia, Tempos
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
# =====================================================
# FUNCION PARA RECONSTRUIR RED AOI->AOI
# =====================================================

build_aoi_network <- function(df){
  
  # =====================================
  # ORDEN TEMPORAL
  # =====================================
  
  df <- df[order(df$Secuencia), ]
  
  areas <- df$Area
  
  if(length(areas) < 2){
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # =====================================
  # VARIABLES SECUENCIALES
  # =====================================
  
  FirstAOI <- as.character(areas[1])
  
  FirstTransition <- paste0(
    areas[1],
    "_",
    areas[2]
  )
  
  First3AOIs <- paste(
    head(areas, 3),
    collapse = "_"
  )
  
  # =====================================
  # RED
  # =====================================
  
  edges <- data.frame(
    from = head(areas, -1),
    to   = tail(areas, -1)
  )
  
  edges_weighted <- edges %>%
    count(from, to, name = "weight")
  
  g <- graph_from_data_frame(
    edges_weighted,
    directed = TRUE
  )
  
  E(g)$weight <- edges_weighted$weight
  
  # =====================================
  # ATRIBUTOS DE NODO
  # =====================================
  
  node_freq <- table(areas)
  
  V(g)$visits <- as.numeric(
    node_freq[
      match(
        V(g)$name,
        names(node_freq)
      )
    ]
  )
  
  # =====================================
  # ENTROPIA DE TRANSICION
  # =====================================
  
  probs <- edges_weighted$weight /
    sum(edges_weighted$weight)
  
  Entropy <- -sum(
    probs * log2(probs)
  )
  
  # =====================================
  # RESULTADO
  # =====================================
  
  return(
    list(
      graph = g,
      edges = edges,
      edges_weighted = edges_weighted,
      node_freq = node_freq,
      
      FirstAOI = FirstAOI,
      FirstTransition = FirstTransition,
      First3AOIs = First3AOIs,
      
      Entropy = Entropy
    )
  )
}


# =====================================================
# CONSTRUIR TODAS LAS REDES
# =====================================================

NetworkList <- list()

TrajectoryFeatures <- data.frame()

subjects <- unique(Secuencia$Sujeto)

for(s in subjects){
  
  cat("Procesando sujeto:",s,"\n")
  
  data_s <- filter(
    Secuencia,
    Sujeto == s
  )
  
  ensayos <- unique(data_s$Ensayo)
  
  for(e in ensayos){
    
    data_se <- filter(
      data_s,
      Ensayo == e
    )
    
    net <- build_aoi_network(data_se)
    
    if(!is.null(net)){
      
      nombre <- paste0(
        "S",
        s,
        "_E",
        e
      )
      
      NetworkList[[nombre]] <- net
      
      # ===================================
      # TABLA DE CARACTERISTICAS
      # ===================================
      
      TrajectoryFeatures <- rbind(
        TrajectoryFeatures,
        data.frame(
          Sujeto = s,
          Ensayo = e,
          
          Choice = unique(data_se$ChosenCondition),
          
          FirstAOI = net$FirstAOI,
          FirstTransition = net$FirstTransition,
          First3AOIs = net$First3AOIs,
          
          Nodes = gorder(net$graph),
          Edges = gsize(net$graph),
          
          Entropy = net$Entropy,
          
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      )
      
    }
  }
}

##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
##   0.000   2.000   2.585   2.540   3.170   5.003
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)

desc <- data.frame(
  Variable = c("Nodes","Edges","Entropy"),
  Mean = c(
    mean(TrajectoryFeatures$Nodes),
    mean(TrajectoryFeatures$Edges),
    mean(TrajectoryFeatures$Entropy)
  ),
  SD = c(
    sd(TrajectoryFeatures$Nodes),
    sd(TrajectoryFeatures$Edges),
    sd(TrajectoryFeatures$Entropy)
  ),
  Min = c(
    min(TrajectoryFeatures$Nodes),
    min(TrajectoryFeatures$Edges),
    min(TrajectoryFeatures$Entropy)
  ),
  Max = c(
    max(TrajectoryFeatures$Nodes),
    max(TrajectoryFeatures$Edges),
    max(TrajectoryFeatures$Entropy)
  )
)

kable(desc,digits=2)
Variable Mean SD Min Max
Nodes 5.33 2.57 1 17
Edges 7.44 4.62 1 33
Entropy 2.54 0.97 0 5 
library(igraph) 
library(dplyr) 
all_edges <- bind_rows( lapply( NetworkList, function(x) x$edges ) ) 
agg_edges <- all_edges %>% count(from,to,name="weight") 
g_agg <- graph_from_data_frame( agg_edges, directed=TRUE ) 
E(g_agg)$width <- scales::rescale( agg_edges$weight, to=c(1,8) ) 
plot( g_agg, edge.arrow.size=.3, vertex.size=35, vertex.label.cex=.9 )

library(ggplot2) 
ggplot( agg_edges, aes( x=from, y=to, fill=weight ) )+ geom_tile()+ scale_fill_viridis_c()+ theme_minimal()+ labs( x="Origin AOI", y="Destination AOI", fill="Transitions" )

choice_desc <- TrajectoryFeatures %>% group_by(Choice) %>% summarise( N=n(), MeanNodes=mean(Nodes), SDNodes=sd(Nodes), MeanEdges=mean(Edges), SDEdges=sd(Edges), MeanEntropy=mean(Entropy), SDEntropy=sd(Entropy) ) 
kable(choice_desc,digits=2)
Choice N MeanNodes SDNodes MeanEdges SDEdges MeanEntropy SDEntropy
Comentarios 257 5.35 2.48 7.38 4.51 2.54 0.94
Precio 261 5.22 2.56 7.12 4.37 2.47 0.98
Real 243 5.44 2.69 7.86 4.96 2.61 0.98

The three groups exhibit remarkably similar exploration characteristics.

library(tidyr) 
## 
## Attaching package: 'tidyr'
## The following object is masked from 'package:igraph':
## 
##     crossing
plot_data <- TrajectoryFeatures %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(Nodes,Edges,Entropy), names_to="Metric", values_to="Value" ) 
ggplot( plot_data, aes( x=Choice, y=Value, fill=Choice ) )+ geom_boxplot()+ facet_wrap(~Metric,scales="free_y")+ theme_minimal()

tabla_firstAOI <- table(
TrajectoryFeatures$FirstAOI,TrajectoryFeatures$Choice)

test_firstAOI <- chisq.test(tabla_firstAOI)
## Warning in chisq.test(tabla_firstAOI): Chi-squared approximation may be
## incorrect
tabla_firstTransition <- table(

TrajectoryFeatures$FirstTransition, TrajectoryFeatures$Choice)



test_firstTransition <- chisq.test(tabla_firstTransition)
## Warning in chisq.test(tabla_firstTransition): Chi-squared approximation may be
## incorrect
# First 3 AOIs

tabla_first3 <- table(TrajectoryFeatures$First3AOIs, TrajectoryFeatures$Choice)


test_first3 <- chisq.test(tabla_first3)
## Warning in chisq.test(tabla_first3): Chi-squared approximation may be incorrect
# ANOVAs

anova_nodes <- summary(aov(Nodes ~ Choice, data = TrajectoryFeatures))

anova_edges <- summary(
aov(Edges ~ Choice, data = TrajectoryFeatures))
anova_entropy <- summary(aov(Entropy ~ Choice, data = TrajectoryFeatures))

multiverse_results <- data.frame(Universe = c(
"FirstAOI",
"FirstTransition",
"First3AOIs",
"Nodes",
"Edges",
"Entropy"),
Test = c("Chi-square", "Chi-square", "Chi-square", "ANOVA", "ANOVA", "ANOVA"),
Pvalue = c(test_firstAOI$p.value, test_firstTransition$p.value, test_first3$p.value, anova_nodes[[1]]["Choice","Pr(>F)"],
anova_edges[[1]]["Choice","Pr(>F)"],
anova_entropy[[1]]["Choice","Pr(>F)"]))

knitr::kable(multiverse_results, digits = 4,
caption = "Results of the multiverse analysis."
)
Results of the multiverse analysis.
Universe Test Pvalue
FirstAOI Chi-square 0.1142
FirstTransition Chi-square 0.1985
First3AOIs Chi-square 0.6125
Nodes ANOVA 0.6237
Edges ANOVA 0.1928
Entropy ANOVA 0.2662

Analysis

library(nnet)
library(pscl)
library(knitr)
library(dplyr)

# Asegurar que es factor
TrajectoryFeatures$Choice <- as.factor(
  TrajectoryFeatures$Choice
)

#################################################
# MODELS
#################################################

m1 <- multinom(
  Choice ~ Entropy,
  data = TrajectoryFeatures,
  trace = FALSE
)

m2 <- multinom(
  Choice ~ Entropy + FirstAOI,
  data = TrajectoryFeatures,
  trace = FALSE
)

m3 <- multinom(
  Choice ~ Entropy + FirstTransition,
  data = TrajectoryFeatures,
  trace = FALSE
)

m4 <- multinom(
  Choice ~ Nodes + Edges + Entropy,
  data = TrajectoryFeatures,
  trace = FALSE
)

#################################################
# TABLE
#################################################

results_models <- data.frame(
  Model = c(
    "M1",
    "M2",
    "M3",
    "M4"
  ),
  
  Predictors = c(
    "Entropy",
    "FirstAOI + Entropy",
    "FirstTransition + Entropy",
    "Nodes + Edges + Entropy"
  ),
  
  McFadden_R2 = c(
    pR2(m1)["McFadden"],
    pR2(m2)["McFadden"],
    pR2(m3)["McFadden"],
    pR2(m4)["McFadden"]
  ),
  
  AIC = c(
    AIC(m1),
    AIC(m2),
    AIC(m3),
    AIC(m4)
  )
)
## fitting null model for pseudo-r2
## fitting null model for pseudo-r2
## fitting null model for pseudo-r2
## fitting null model for pseudo-r2
results_models <- results_models %>%
  mutate(
    McFadden_R2 = round(McFadden_R2, 3),
    AIC = round(AIC, 1)
  )

kable(
  results_models,
  caption = "Comparative performance of multinomial models predicting booking decisions from alternative representations of visual exploration."
)
Comparative performance of multinomial models predicting booking decisions from alternative representations of visual exploration.
Model Predictors McFadden_R2 AIC
M1 Entropy 0.002 1676.7
M2 FirstAOI + Entropy 0.041 1702.2
M3 FirstTransition + Entropy 0.293 1978.3
M4 Nodes + Edges + Entropy 0.003 1681.7

Most global representations of visual exploration fail to discriminate booking decisions. However, local early-stage navigational behavior contains substantially more predictive information than later aggregate exploration characteristics.

library(pheatmap)

# matriz de transiciones
mat <- xtabs(
  weight ~ from + to,
  data = agg_edges
)

pheatmap(
  mat,
  clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
  clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean",
  clustering_method = "ward.D2",
  color = colorRampPalette(
    c("white","orange","red")
  )(100)
)
